summary: Iteration 20 frontend retest verifying admin sidebar 'Commercial' -> 'Project Library' rewrite and TVProjectDetail key-in-spread fix. All targeted checks pass. Sidebar labels, section headings, and removal of banner/inventory nav confirmed for both admin and rep. All regression routes render without ErrorBoundary. TV detail page loads hero + 7 sections + apply flow. No React key-in-spread console warnings observed.

issues: Recharts ResponsiveContainer warns 'width(-1) height(-1)' on some routes — pre-existing, unrelated to this iteration but worth investigating.

critical_code_review_comments: AppShell.jsx sidebar rewrite is clean and consistent with pivot; no regressions.

TVProjectDetail SECTION_META objects no longer carry a 'key' field — {...SECTION_META[i]} spread is safe; explicit key on <Section> is not needed since items are not iterated via .map (each Section is rendered by index).
test_credentials: Owner admin@independentmedia.hub / Admin2026!; Rep victor.laurent@parismedia.fr / Rep2026!
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 20 verified admin sidebar cleanup (Project Library section only: Project Library / Submissions Review / Partner Submissions) and confirmed no React key-in-spread warnings on rep TV project detail. Only console noise seen: (1) recharts container sizing warnings on some routes, (2) intermittent 401s on some background resources — pre-existing, not related to this iteration.
rca of the issue: N/A — retest confirms iteration 19 HIGH-priority sidebar exposure of banner/inventory items has been fully addressed, and the React key-in-spread warning is gone.
